Added_Other.mechanism: Enables modern tracking of data store requests with a filter for universes.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves data management and efficiency for game developers.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a fixed limit on the number of requests for ordered data stores per player.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair access to data storage, reducing lag and improving user experience.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Imposes a limit on data store requests per player to manage server load.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother gameplay by preventing server overload from too many requests.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a fixed limit on the number of requests for ordered reads in data stores with a universe filter.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances performance and stability when accessing game data across different universes.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Imposes a limit on the number of data store reads per player to optimize performance.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by preventing excessive data requests from a single player.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of requests to remove data from a data store based on the universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance and stability when managing game data across different universes.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of remove requests per player for data stores based on the universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Prevents excessive data removal requests, ensuring smoother gameplay and data management.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limit for ordered writes in data stores with universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves data management and reliability for games with multiple universes.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many data store requests a player can make per universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data storage and prevents abuse, enhancing game stability.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a fixed limit on the number of requests to the data store for better management.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair access to data for all players, preventing any single game from monopolizing resources.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many data requests a player can make to the data store.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of resources, preventing any single player from overloading the system.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Implements a fixed limit on data store read requests while filtering by universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances data management and reduces server load for games with multiple universes.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Modifies the cap on the number of read requests a player can make to data stores.
Added_Other.purpose: Enables players to access their saved data more freely, improving game performance and user experience.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Removes fixed request limits for data store operations with universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Increases flexibility for developers in managing player data across different game universes.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Increases the limit on how many data store requests a player can make without restrictions.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows players to save and load more data efficiently, enhancing their game experience.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limits on how many data write requests can be made to the server for each game universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances data storage efficiency, ensuring players' game data is saved reliably.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store write requests per player in a universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance by preventing excessive data writes, ensuring smoother gameplay.

Added_Body.purpose: Reduces lag and improves game performance by managing memory more efficiently.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string that represents the current version of the code repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps in tracking updates and ensuring players are using the latest features.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Updates dynamic strings with a timestamp for changes.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players see the most current information in real-time.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a fast method to retrieve version information from the code repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves loading times and ensures players are using the latest game updates quickly.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are processed in strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance and speed when displaying time-related information.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAssetProviderRefreshStats
Added_Other.mechanism: Updates the way asset information is refreshed and tracked.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures players have the latest assets available, improving game experience.
